Bus Timings

How to Reach Rashidiya from Mussafah by Bus: Timings and Travel Tips

April 6, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

If you’re planning a trip from Mussafah to Rashidiya, taking the bus is an efficient and budget-friendly option. This guide will walk you through the journey, providing you with all the necessary details to make your travel experience seamless and enjoyable. Whether you’re a local or a visitor, navigating Dubai’s public transport can be straightforward and rewarding with the right information.

1. Bus Route from Mussafah Shabiya to Rashidiya (Best Overall)

This route offers a great balance between cost and travel time, combining bus and metro services for a smooth journey.

  • Estimated Total Travel Time: 2 hours 40 minutes

  • Cost: AED 32-44

Journey Overview:

Step 1: Start at Mussafah Shabiya Bus Station 2 hours 13 minutes, AED 32-44, Bus: E102 (Regular service), Stop: Al Jafiliya Bus Station.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

Step 2: Transfer at Al Jafiliya Bus Station 3 minutes, Walk to Max Metro Station. This brief transfer involves a short walk to connect with the metro service.

Step 3: Ride the Metro to Centerpoint Metro Station 24 minutes, Metro Line: MRed (Regular service). Upon arriving at Centerpoint Metro Station, you will be just a short distance from your final destination in Rashidiya.

Additional Travel Tips

  • Plan Ahead: Check the latest bus and metro schedules online to avoid any surprises on travel day.

  • Keep Essentials Handy: Make sure you have your Nol card ready for easy access to public transport.
  • Explore Along the Way: If time allows, consider stopping at some attractions near the bus or metro stations for a quick sightseeing adventure.

Some other interesting trips you can check out include Ajman to Umm Al Quwain and Fujairah to Umm Al Quwain.

With this information in hand, you’re well-equipped to navigate your journey from Mussafah to Rashidiya smoothly. Enjoy your travels and the vibrant sights of Dubai! Don’t forget to keep your bus and metro schedules handy, as this will help you plan your trip effectively. Safe travels, and may your adventure through this stunning city be filled with memorable experiences!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • RTA E102 Timetable (Ibn Battuta-Mussafah Reference)
  • RTA Journey Planner

Editorial review date: May 15, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
